
---
title: "Airline_End2End_Analysis 2026-02-23 14:14:14"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
---


```{r}
library(SparkR)

sas_token <- "sp=r&st=2026-02-23T13:10:16Z&se=2026-02-23T21:25:16Z&spr=https&sv=2024-11-04&sr=c&sig=sW08N1Brspw7Vn0T8ScGYFEjYhSG7K8%2BTcd%2B4v7slJk%3D"

sparkR.session(sparkConfig = list(
  "fs.azure.sas.sales-data.omamegbedatalake.blob.core.windows.net" = sas_token
))

df <- read.df(
  "wasbs://sales-data@omamegbedatalake.blob.core.windows.net/airline_passenger_satisfaction.csv",
  source = "csv",
  header = "true",
  inferSchema = "true"
)

display(df)
```


```{r}
# Data overview and inspection
printSchema(df)
head(df)
summary(df)
```


```{r}
numeric_cols <- c("Age", "Flight Distance", "Departure Delay", "Arrival Delay",
                  "Departure and Arrival Time Convenience", "Ease of Online Booking",
                  "Check-in Service", "Online Boarding", "Gate Location", 
                  "On-board Service", "Seat Comfort", "Leg Room Service",
                  "Cleanliness", "Food and Drink", "In-flight Service", 
                  "In-flight Wifi Service", "In-flight Entertainment", "Baggage Handling")

for (col in numeric_cols) {
  df[[col]] <- cast(df[[col]], "double")
}
```


```{r}
df$Satisfaction <- regexp_replace(df$Satisfaction, "Neutral or Dissatisfied", "Dissatisfied")
```


```{r}
display(count(groupBy(df, df$Satisfaction)))
```


```{r}
local_df <- collect(df)
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(local_df, aes(x = Satisfaction, fill = Satisfaction)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(title = "Passenger Satisfaction Distribution", x = "Satisfaction", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
ggplot(local_df, aes(x = Class, fill = Satisfaction)) +
  geom_bar(position = "dodge") +
  labs(title = "Satisfaction by Travel Class") +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)

local_df %>%
  group_by(`Customer Type`, Satisfaction) %>%
  summarise(avg_distance = mean(`Flight Distance`, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = `Customer Type`, y = avg_distance, fill = Satisfaction)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  labs(title = "Average Flight Distance by Customer Type", y = "Average Distance (miles)") +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
ggplot(local_df, aes(x = `Departure Delay`, fill = Satisfaction)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, alpha = 0.6, position = "identity") +
  labs(title = "Departure Delay vs. Satisfaction") +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
model_cols <- c("Age", "Flight Distance", "Departure Delay", "Arrival Delay",
                "Seat Comfort", "In-flight Service", "Leg Room Service", 
                "Food and Drink", "In-flight Entertainment", "Baggage Handling", 
                "Satisfaction")

model_df <- df[, model_cols]
model_df <- na.omit(model_df)
```


```{r}
# Rename columns to remove spaces for formula compatibility
model_df <- withColumnRenamed(model_df, "Flight Distance", "Flight_Distance")
model_df <- withColumnRenamed(model_df, "Departure Delay", "Departure_Delay")
model_df <- withColumnRenamed(model_df, "Arrival Delay", "Arrival_Delay")
model_df <- withColumnRenamed(model_df, "Seat Comfort", "Seat_Comfort")
model_df <- withColumnRenamed(model_df, "In-flight Service", "Inflight_Service")
model_df <- withColumnRenamed(model_df, "Leg Room Service", "Leg_Room_Service")
model_df <- withColumnRenamed(model_df, "Food and Drink", "Food_and_Drink")
model_df <- withColumnRenamed(model_df, "In-flight Entertainment", "Inflight_Entertainment")
model_df <- withColumnRenamed(model_df, "Baggage Handling", "Baggage_Handling")

model <- spark.logit(model_df, Satisfaction ~ Age + Flight_Distance + Departure_Delay + Arrival_Delay + Seat_Comfort + Inflight_Service + Leg_Room_Service + Food_and_Drink + Inflight_Entertainment + Baggage_Handling)

summary(model)
```


```{r}
model <- spark.logit(
  model_df,
  Satisfaction ~ Age + Flight_Distance + Departure_Delay + 
                 Arrival_Delay + Seat_Comfort + Inflight_Service +
                 Leg_Room_Service + Food_and_Drink + 
                 Inflight_Entertainment + Baggage_Handling
)

summary(model)
```


```{r}
predictions <- predict(model, model_df)
preds <- SparkR::collect(predictions)

# Confusion Matrix
table(preds$Satisfaction, preds$prediction)
```


```{r}
coef_df <- as.data.frame(summary(model)$coefficients)
coef_df$Feature <- rownames(coef_df)

ggplot(coef_df[-1, ], aes(x = reorder(Feature, Estimate), y = Estimate)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Feature Importance (Logistic Regression)",
       x = "Feature", y = "Coefficient") +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
# Rename columns to replace spaces with underscores for Delta compatibility
for (col_name in colnames(df)) {
  new_name <- gsub(" ", "_", col_name)
  df <- withColumnRenamed(df, col_name, new_name)
}

write.df(df,
         path = "/Workspace/Users/cu.omams@gmail.com/cleaned_airline_satisfaction",
         source = "delta",
         mode = "overwrite")
```


```{r}
# Read the cleaned data from Delta table
df_clean <- SparkR::read.df(
  "/Workspace/Users/cu.omams@gmail.com/cleaned_airline_satisfaction",
  source = "delta"
)

SparkR::write.df(df_clean,
         path = "/Workspace/Users/cu.omams@gmail.com/cleaned_airline_satisfaction_csv",
         source = "csv",
         mode = "overwrite")
```


```{r}
# Download link for CSV output:
# https://<your-workspace>#/files/Workspace/Users/cu.omams@gmail.com/cleaned_airline_satisfaction_csv
```
